sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77232" key="panamei/dhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰν-ᾰμείδητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n77232.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">all-unsmiling</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρόσωπα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:141" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.141</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
